title: Pecan prototype
summary: Feb 18–Mar 5, 2026 Pecan-era spikes: staged Pest/HIR analysis, JIT/runtime with gc-arena simple GC research, historical pecan_lsp, stage-8 compiler-mod metaprogramming, and project.pn exploration—ending at compiler submodule handoff (dd75bff). Full narrative: data/v0.0/article.md.

cutoff.rationale: Covers the deleted pekan repository from Initial Commit (269ac9d, 2026-02-18) through the last Pecan-era compiler snapshot before the dedicated compiler submodule (dd75bff, 2026-03-05). Cascade snapshot commits are omitted. Parallel GC (abfall), production LSP (beskid lsp), and Project.proj/pckg packaging belong to later delivery bands.
